name: Spellbreaker of the Ice Barrier

name_jp_tl: Sealing Spell Team of the Ice Barrier
desc: Once per turn: You can send 1 "Ice Barrier" monster from your hand to the GY; neither player can activate Spell Cards until the end of your next turn, while this monster is face-up on the field.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can send 1 "Ice Barrier" monster from your hand to the GY; neither player can activate Spell Cards until the end of your next turn, while this monster is face-up on the field.
eff: Once per turn: You can send 1 "Ice Barrier" monster from your hand to the GY; neither player can activate Spell Cards until the end of your next turn, while this monster is face-up on the field.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
